summary: Russian strike drones attacked multiple Ukrainian regions including Sumy, Kharkiv, and Zaporizhzhia, causing civilian casualties and infrastructure damage. Ukrainian forces reported numerous UAV incursions across Kharkiv, Dnipropetrovsk, and Kherson oblasts. Both sides continue intensive aerial operations with reported hits on airfields and fuel depots.
key_points: Russian strike drones hit Sumy, Kharkiv and Pavlovgrad districts, causing civilian injuries and power outages in Sevastopol (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Ukrainian reports list several reactive UAV groups moving from Russian‑occupied territories toward Ukrainian cities such as Kharkiv, Dnipro, and Sumy (Source: @kpszsu/66235).
A Russian drone struck a fuel station on the outskirts of Sumy, injuring three civilians (Source: @UkraineNow/82145).
Ukrainian air defence shot down 245 UAVs over Russian regions and the Black Sea in one day (Source: @tass_agency/382259).
Ukrainian special forces damaged air defence systems and hangars at the Saki airfield in Crimea (Source: @UkraineNow/82144).
A Russian Mi‑2 helicopter crashed during agricultural work in the Krasnodar region, unrelated to the front (Source: @eRadarrua/97997).
Russian forces attacked a beach in Zaporizhzhia, killing four people, three of them children (Source: @UkraineNow/82150).
Power outages reported in Kherson region affecting multiple districts (Source: @UkraineNow/82143).

sections.executive_summary: Russian strike drones hit Sumy, Kharkiv and Pavlovgrad districts, causing civilian injuries and power outages in Sevastopol (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127). Ukrainian reports list several reactive UAV groups moving from Russian‑occupied territories toward Ukrainian cities such as Kharkiv, Dnipro, and Sumy (Source: @kpszsu/66235). A Russian drone struck a fuel station on the outskirts of Sumy, injuring three civilians (Source: @UkraineNow/82145).

points: Ukrainian defence forces reported a group of reactive UAVs crossing Kharkiv oblast near Bogoduhiv heading south, and another heading north toward the Dnipro suburb (Source: @kpszsu/66235).
In Dnipropetrovsk region a reactive UAV was observed near Sofiyivka (Source: @eRadarrua/97990).
Ukrainian special forces damaged air defence assets at the Saki airfield in Crimea, destroying four aircraft hangars and hitting S‑400 and Pantsir‑S1 systems near Kerch (Source: @UkraineNow/82144).
A Russian drone attack on a fuel station near Sumy injured three civilians, who are receiving medical care (Source: @UkraineNow/82145).
Power outages affected multiple districts in Kherson region, with reports of partial or full loss of electricity (Source: @UkraineNow/82143).
Russian strike drones conducted overnight attacks on Sumy, Kharkiv and Pavlovgrad districts, injuring civilians and causing power loss in Sevastopol (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
A Russian UAV group launched from Belgorod oblast moved south toward Okhtyrka in Sumy region (Source: @kpszsu/66189).
Russian forces hit a beach in Zaporizhzhia, resulting in four civilian deaths, including three children (Source: @UkraineNow/82150).
Russian Mi‑2 helicopter crashed during agricultural work in the Krasnodar region (Source: @eRadarrua/97997).
Russian air defence claimed to have shot down 245 Ukrainian UAVs over Russian territory and the Black Sea in a single day (Source: @tass_agency/382259).
Ukrainian reports list multiple UAV groups moving from Russian‑occupied Kursk and Belgorod oblasts toward Sumy, including a new group from Kursk heading south (Source: @kpszsu/66237).
In Sumy region, a UAV strike hit a fuel station on the outskirts, injuring three civilians (Source: @UkraineNow/82145).
Ukrainian assault units continue small‑arms battles in Shostka district (Bachevsk) and villages such as Ivolzhansk, Pysarevka, and Novaya Sech (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Russian UAV attacks were reported in the Pavlovgrad district of Kharkiv oblast (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
A Russian drone injured a civilian in the village of 1st Yankovo, Rylsk district, Kursk region (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Ukrainian forces reported a UAV group from Belgorod moving toward Okhtyrka in Sumy region (Source: @kpszsu/66189).
In the Kharkiv direction, Ukrainian assault units are active in Kazachya Lopan and nearby forest areas (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Ukrainian small‑arms fighting continues in the Shostka district, Bachevsk (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
A Russian UAV injured a civilian in the village of Aleksandrovka, Shebekinsky district, Belgorod (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Ukrainian defence reported a UAV incident in the village of 1st Yankovo, Rylsk district, Kursk (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Russian drones attacked fuel depots of Ukrnafta in Zaporizhzhia, Mykolaiv and Dnipropetrovsk regions (Source: @UkraineNow/82159).
A Russian drone strike on a beach in Zaporizhzhia killed four people, three of them children (Source: @UkraineNow/82150).
Ukrainian reports list a UAV group from the Black Sea heading north past Ochakiv in Mykolaiv oblast (Source: @kpszsu/66228).
Ukrainian UAV activity observed on the western outskirts of Kherson, heading north‑northeast (Source: @kpszsu/66232).
Ukrainian forces reported a UAV on the eastern Dnipropetrovsk area heading toward Shakhtarske and Pavlograd (Source: @kpszsu/66234).
Russian air defence claimed 245 Ukrainian UAVs were downed over Russian regions and the Black Sea in one day (Source: @tass_agency/382259).
Ukrainian special forces damaged air defence systems and aircraft hangars at the Saki airfield in Crimea (Source: @UkraineNow/82144).
Russian UAVs struck multiple Ukrainian locations including Sumy, Kharkiv, and Pavlovgrad districts (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Ukrainian reports list reactive UAV groups moving from Russian‑occupied territories toward Ukrainian cities such as Kharkiv, Dnipro, and Sumy (Source: @kpszsu/66235).
A Russian Mi‑2 helicopter crashed during agricultural work in the Krasnodar region, indicating non‑combat losses (Source: @eRadarrua/97997).

key_developments: Russian strike drones hit Sumy, Kharkiv and Pavlovgrad districts, causing civilian injuries and power loss in Sevastopol (Source: @ukr_leaks_eng/31127).
Ukrainian defence reported multiple reactive UAV groups crossing from Russian‑occupied oblasts toward Kharkiv, Dnipro and Sumy (Source: @kpszsu/66235).
Ukrainian special forces damaged air defence assets and aircraft hangars at the Saki airfield in Crimea (Source: @UkraineNow/82144).
A Russian drone attack on a fuel station near Sumy injured three civilians (Source: @UkraineNow/82145).
Russian forces attacked a beach in Zaporizhzhia, killing four civilians, three of them children (Source: @UkraineNow/82150).
Russian air defence reported shooting down 245 Ukrainian UAVs over Russian territory and the Black Sea in one day (Source: @tass_agency/382259).
Power outages affected multiple districts in Kherson region, with reports of partial or full loss of electricity (Source: @UkraineNow/82143).
sections.threat_assessment: Ukrainian forces face a high volume of Russian strike UAVs targeting civilian infrastructure and frontline positions across the eastern and southern fronts, indicating an intensified aerial campaign. Russian air defence claims significant UAV attrition, but continued Ukrainian UAV incursions suggest gaps in Russian coverage, especially over occupied Crimea and the Black Sea. The destruction of air defence assets at Saki airfield may temporarily reduce Russian aerial protection in the region, potentially opening opportunities for Ukrainian air operations.
sections.regional_response: Ukrainian authorities have reported civilian casualties and infrastructure damage, prompting local emergency responses and medical assistance in Sumy and Zaporizhzhia. Russian officials highlight successful UAV interceptions, aiming to demonstrate air defence effectiveness. International observers note the escalation of drone use as a key factor shaping the conflict's dynamics on both fronts.
sections.intelligence_notes: Monitoring of reactive UAV groups originating from Kursk, Belgorod and Russian‑occupied Crimea remains critical, as they frequently target strategic logistics hubs in Kharkiv, Dnipro and Sumy. The recent damage to Saki airfield's hangars and air defence systems may affect Russian sortie rates from Crimea. Continued civilian impact from drone strikes underscores the need for enhanced air defence coordination in vulnerable southern regions.
